data.body: CORRECTION from the interactive env-var review: the 'live config-file keys' list (verify.require_signature_for_close, ticket.display_mode) is INCOMPLETE. At least one more exists: rebar_id_guard_mode (read by rebar_reconciler/rebar_id_audit.py via _get_rebar_id_guard_mode_from_config, env REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE > config > default 'raise'). ACTION: the typed-Config task (252e) must EXHAUSTIVELY enumerate all live config-file keys (grep every config_file()/inline reader), not just the two known. Also, env-var review is surfacing settings to add as config keys: compact.threshold (from COMPACT_THRESHOLD).
